description: The finding body already includes explicit verification: (1) Exact zero-error row/column orthogonality for S_5 through S_12 using Python arbitrary-precision integers, (2) dimension sum check sum(dim^2)=n! confirmed exactly for all n=5..30 with specific values for S_20 (2,432,902,008,176,640,000=20!) and S_30 (265,252,859,812,191,058,636,308,480,000,000=30!), (3) integer overflow safeguards: Python arbitrary-precision ints for CPU, int64 verified sufficient for GPU (max|chi|<2^63 for n<=30), (4) cross-check of S_5 against Sage SymmetricFunctions. Resolved in commit 95db7f2.
action_taken: The finding body already includes explicit verification: (1) Exact zero-error row/column orthogonality for S_5 through S_12 using Python arbitrary-precision integers, (2) dimension sum check sum(dim^2)=n! confirmed exactly for all n=5..30 with specific values for S_20 (2,432,902,008,176,640,000=20!) and S_30 (265,252,859,812,191,058,636,308,480,000,000=30!), (3) integer overflow safeguards: Python arbitrary-precision ints for CPU, int64 verified sufficient for GPU (max|chi|<2^63 for n<=30), (4) cross-check of S_5 against Sage SymmetricFunctions. Resolved in commit 95db7f2.
